TableName.description: The name of the table containing the item to update

Key.description: The primary key of the item to update

UpdateExpression.description: An expression that defines one or more attributes to be updated, the action to be performed on them, and new values for them

ConditionExpression.description: A condition that must be satisfied for the update to succeed

ReturnValues.description: Whether to return the item attributes as they appeared before or after the update
